query: What is your return policy for smartphones?
reference: Smartphones can be returned within 30 days. Items must be in original packaging with no physical damage and require a factory reset. Returns are processed through the online RMA portal or technical support, with refunds issued 5-7 business days after inspection. Return shipping is free with a prepaid label. A 1-year manufacturer warranty is included. There is no restocking fee for unopened items, but a 15% restocking fee applies to opened items.

query: My laptop won't turn on, help me troubleshoot
reference: To troubleshoot a laptop that won't turn on: confirm the power adapter is securely connected and the outlet works; let the battery charge for at least 15-30 minutes before retrying; perform a hard reset by holding the power button for 15-20 seconds with the charger connected; disconnect external peripherals and try again; and check that the charging indicator light comes on. If there is still no response after these steps, the issue may require professional repair or warranty service.

query: I can't connect to WiFi on my new laptop
reference: To resolve Wi-Fi connection problems on a new laptop: toggle Wi-Fi off and back on and confirm airplane mode is disabled; restart both the laptop and the router; forget the network and reconnect by re-entering the password; update or reinstall the wireless network adapter drivers; and run the operating system's network troubleshooter. Verify other devices can reach the same network to isolate whether the issue is the laptop or the router. If the connection still fails, contact technical support for further diagnosis.
